endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Automation/automationAccounts/{automationAccountName}/connectionTypes
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of connection types.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{AUTOMATIONACCOUNTNAME}} with a real automationaccountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Automation/automationAccounts/{automationAccountName}/connectionTypes/{connectionTypeName}
endpoints.description: Retrieve the connection type identified by connection type name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{AUTOMATIONACCOUNTNAME}} with a real automationaccountname. Replace {{CONNECTIONTYPENAME}} with a real connectiontypename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Automation/automationAccounts/{automationAccountName}/connectionTypes/{connectionTypeName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{AUTOMATIONACCOUNTNAME}} with a real automationaccountname. Replace {{CONNECTIONTYPENAME}} with a real connectiontypename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Automation/automationAccounts/{automationAccountName}/connectionTypes/{connectionTypeName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{AUTOMATIONACCOUNTNAME}} with a real automationaccountname. Replace {{CONNECTIONTYPENAME}} with a real connectiontypename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
